title: DNA Extraction Procedure Using SDS
author: Jiang Hu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jg4cjyw

steps.title: Cut tissue and grind by liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Cut tissue and grind by liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Transfer grinded tissue to 15 ml tube
steps.instruction: Transfer grinded tissue to 15 ml tube.

steps.title: Incubate homogenate for 2 h at...
steps.instruction: Incubate homogenate for 2 h at 56 ℃ , gently blending for every 5 ~ 10 min. 02:00:00, Incubation at 56 ℃ 00:10:00, Blending

steps.title: Cool down to room temperature
steps.instruction: Cool down to room temperature.

steps.title: Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1)...
steps.instruction: Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to the supernatant, then mix.

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0.8 X volume of frozen isopropyl alcohol.

steps.title: Add 200 µl TEN and 2 µl RNAse (100 mg/ml)
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl TEN and 2 µl RNAse (100 mg/ml). undetermined, TEN undetermined, RNAse (100 mg/ml)

steps.title: Add buffer (TEN and 200 µl...
steps.instruction: Add buffer (TEN and 200 µl 20% SDS) and 40 µl Protease K up to 2 ml. undetermined, 20% SDS undetermined, Protease K

steps.title: Add 300 µl EB (pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 300 µl EB (pH 8.0) to dissolve. undetermined, EB

steps.title: Add 6ml TEN, 700µl 20% SDS（56℃preheat),...
steps.instruction: Add 6ml TEN, 700µl 20% SDS（56℃preheat), 150µl beta mercaptoethanol and 150 µl proteinase K, rapidly mix. undetermined, TEN undetermined, 20% SDS undetermined, beta mercaptoethanol undetermined, proteinase K

steps.title: Add an equal volume of Tris saturated phenol and mix
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of Tris saturated phenol and mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature (＞16 ℃)...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature (＞16 ℃) with 14000 RPM for 10 min, then save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Wash with cold ethanol 75%
steps.instruction: Wash with cold ethanol 75%. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash with cold ethanol 75%
steps.instruction: Wash with cold ethanol 75%. (2/2)

steps.title: Let it dry
steps.instruction: Let it dry.

steps.title: 37 ℃ for 30 min, incubation...
steps.instruction: 37 ℃ for 30 min, incubation period precipitation with Tip dolly, precipitate dissolve completely. 00:30:00, Incubation

steps.title: Incubate for 30 min at 56 ℃
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 min at 56 ℃. 00:30:00, Incubation at 56 ℃

steps.title: Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to supernatant, then mix
steps.instruction: Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to supernatant, then mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0.8 X volume of frozen isopropyl alcohol.

steps.title: Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%
steps.instruction: Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%. (1/2)

steps.title: Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%
steps.instruction: Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%. (2/2)

steps.title: Let it dry
steps.instruction: Let it dry.
